scope: V3 presentation material and clean git-archive reproducibility

resolved_clean_archive_findings.finding: git ls-files discovered an outer repository and returned an empty candidate set for an ignored nested archive
resolved_clean_archive_findings.resolution: Git candidates are used only when git top-level equals the audit root; otherwise the snapshot filesystem is scanned

resolved_clean_archive_findings.finding: importing the audit module created runtime __pycache__ files before filesystem scanning
resolved_clean_archive_findings.resolution: filesystem snapshot discovery excludes runtime cache directories while still rejecting packaged pyc files outside those directories

resolved_clean_archive_findings.finding: the original audit test required candidate_source=git and could not run from an archive
resolved_clean_archive_findings.resolution: the test derives the expected source from the presence of root Git metadata

claim_boundaries: The clean archive proves release-focused tests and CLI reproducibility for the tested source commit; it is not a live-model repair result.
The packaging verification artifacts are committed after the tested source archive and are not part of that archive hash.
The 60 LLM and 60 Hybrid live trials remain pending and no live repair metric is inferred from documentation or clean-archive success.
Filesystem snapshot hygiene excludes runtime cache directories; the source commit is independently audited through the Git candidate set before archiving.
